form.formComment: Has hit the frame the last couple. Finished third at Horsham latest but prior to that clocked a slick 25.43 over 450m finishing second at Shepparton. Looks the one to beat with a repeat of that effort.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has hit the frame the last couple. Finished third at Horsham latest but prior to that clocked a slick 25.43 over 450m finishing second at Shepparton. Looks the one to beat with a repeat of that effort.

form.formComment: Showed good early speed on debut. Won easily by 6 lengths at this track (25.47) beating Valkyrie Legend in a Maiden on April 8. Will find this much tougher but she's got good box manners and speed. Looks to be back in fine fettle. Makes plenty of appeal.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Showed good early speed on debut. Won easily by 6 lengths at this track (25.47) beating Valkyrie Legend in a Maiden on April 8. Will find this much tougher but she's got good box manners and speed. Looks to be back in fine fettle. Makes plenty of appeal.

form.formComment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 9 length third (30.32) over 525m at The Meadows. Looks a solid contender.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 9 length third (30.32) over 525m at The Meadows. Looks a solid contender.

form.formComment: Impressive performance to score by one length in a Mix 6/7 last start at this track, recording a solid 25.30 over the 450m journey. Should be in this for a long way.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Impressive performance to score by one length in a Mix 6/7 last start at this track, recording a solid 25.30 over the 450m journey. Should be in this for a long way.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Stumbled soon after start and lost ground.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Horsham to win by 1.3 lengths in 23.43, beating Starbright Hud. Last start finished 6th in a Restricted WIN on April 7 over 410m at Horsham behind Paw Quantum beaten 6 lengths (23.87). Others make more appeal.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Good effort last time when second (25.40) over 450m at this track. Looks tested in this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort last time when second (25.40) over 450m at this track. Looks tested in this line-up.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 3.5 lengths at Geelong over 460m (26.02) beating Stand Near in Maiden on April 3. Got off the mark last time but might find this too rich.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Solid performance to win by 3.5 lengths at Geelong over 460m (26.02) beating Stand Near in Maiden on April 3. Got off the mark last time but might find this too rich.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a quick early split but had to settle for the minor money when third (25.55) over 450m at this track. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a quick early split but had to settle for the minor money when third (25.55) over 450m at this track. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Showing promise but missed the frame last start when fourth at Geelong. Form solid prior to that including a win at this track three back. Others rate better this time.

form.formComment: Most recent effort finished 6th in a Mix 6/7 on April 6 over 450m at Shepparton behind Wanbi beaten 9 lengths (26.00). Expected to bounce back. Among the chances.
